misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: Miso, a formidable presence hailing from Hirsala Golf, is a well-known competitor in the Hector Trophée. Known for his unwavering focus and meticulous attention to detail, Miso has secured one coveted Hector Trophée title in his career.

Miso is known to be superstitious on the course, meticulously aligning his golf balls and pacing out each putt with the precision of a seasoned surveyor. He has competed in 10 previous iterations of the event. While he has yet to claim the Victor Trophy, his consistent performance makes him a threat each year.

Off the course, Miso is a man of simple pleasures. It is rumoured that Miso, such is his dedication to the craft, sleeps with his Miura irons. While he is not in the field for Hector Trophée 2026, the possibility of a late entry always looms.
